seo.title: Accessibility Statement | BuiltWell CT
seo.description: BuiltWell CT is committed to providing a website that is accessible to the widest possible audience, including users with disabilities.

data.headline: Accessibility Statement
data.subheadline: BuiltWell CT is committed to making this website accessible to every Connecticut homeowner, including users with disabilities.

data.title: Our Commitment
data.content:
BuiltWell CT is committed to providing a website that is accessible to the widest possible audience, regardless of ability or technology. We work to follow the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level AA, which are the international standard for digital accessibility.

This statement applies to content published on builtwellct.com. We continually review the site, address issues as they are identified, and prioritize fixes for any barrier that prevents a person from accessing essential information about our remodeling services or contacting us about a project.

data.title: Measures We Take
data.content: We design and build pages with semantic HTML, descriptive link text, and properly labeled form fields. We provide alternative text for meaningful images and captions where needed. Color contrast is reviewed against WCAG AA thresholds. Interactive elements are operable with a keyboard, and the site is tested with screen readers including VoiceOver and NVDA. Where third-party content (such as embedded maps or video) does not meet our accessibility standards, we provide alternative ways to access the same information.

data.title: Known Limitations
data.content: No website is fully free of accessibility issues, and we do not claim that this one is. If you encounter a barrier on builtwellct.com, please contact us using the methods below. We will do our best to provide the requested information in a format that works for you within a reasonable time, generally within five business days.

data.title: Contact Us About Accessibility
data.content:
If you experience any difficulty accessing content on this site, please contact us:

BuiltWell CT (Legacy of Clean LLC d/b/a BuiltWell CT)
206A Boston Post Road, Orange, CT 06477
Phone: (203) 466-9148
Email: info@builtwellct.com

Please describe the page or feature you were trying to access, the assistive technology or browser you were using, and the issue you encountered. We respond to accessibility inquiries within five business days.

data.title: Physical Accessibility of Our Services
data.content: BuiltWell CT also offers home modifications that improve in-home accessibility, including grab bars, walk-in showers, ramps with proper slope, lever-style hardware, and aging-in-place upgrades. Information about these services is available on our [Comfort and Accessibility Remodeling](/comfort-accessibility-remodeling/) page.

data.title: Updates to This Statement
data.content: This statement was last updated on May 1, 2026. We review and update it as the site changes and as we receive feedback from users. The current version is always published at /accessibility/.
